title: SCP-6572, Sword that cuts Everything
description: A cursed sword capable of cutting through almost anything.
body:
Sword that cuts Everything adds a new weapon. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-6572, also known as the Sword that cuts Everything.


SCP-6572 can be found embedded in the ground in forests, jungles, and taiga biomes. Players may pull the sword from the ground or place it back at any time. The Sword can destroy any block except unbreakable blocks, but won't drop them. The Sword also does a lot of damage but has a limited use but could defeat monsters or bosses with a lot of health just within a few swings.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
  
● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-6572 spawn?

SCP-6572 can spawn in forests, jungles and taigas on the overworld surface, sticking in a stone block. However, there can only multiple instance of SCP-6572.

</details>



![SCP-6572](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea243e8b0841322f1f75c2dc29db13ca38465723_0.webp)

SCP-6572 is an anomalous sword capable of cutting through nearly any material and ignoring normal harvesting limits except of unbreakable blocks like bedrock. It can be found in jungle, taiga and forest biomes on the surface, sticking in a stone block. If right clicked, you can pick it up and place it again while sneaking and right clicking a block. When destroying blocks, those blocks won't drop but emits smoke and fire particles. After breaking 100 blocks, the blade temporarily enters a short cooldown before it can be used again. In combat, SCP-6572 is devastating. It deals 150 damage, instantly killing most creatures on hit, breaking all armor it strikes and briefly setting targets on fire as if sliced apart. However, its immense power comes with drawbacks: the sword swings very slowly, has a short attack cooldown, and a limited durability.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
